# 90-Day Compounding Plan

## Month 1: Find signal

Many small tests, high-intent demand, proof validation, first activation events.

## Month 2: Build repeatability

Double down on winning buyer state, create more landing pages, improve onboarding, add retargeting sequences, run first lift/holdout if volume allows.

## Month 3: Scale carefully

Increase budget on validated paths, create channel-specific creatives, build AI-search content moat, improve conversion rate, refine CAC/payback model.

By day 90 the agent should know best buyer state, channel, offer, proof path, and next scale constraints.
